title: British Fish and Eggplant Fry
description: A British-inspired dish featuring fish, eggplant, and chips, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the eggplant and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until tender.
Add the fish fillet to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Cook the chips according to the package instructions.
Serve the fish and eggplant together with the chips and a drizzle of malty.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
